title: senecio deltoideus
intro: Senecio deltoideus, also known as the deltoid groundsel, is a plant species within the dandelion family, native to South Africa and widely cultivated for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio deltoideus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its traditional use in treating various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Senecio deltoideus is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, and used to treat a range of health conditions.
